title: verbascum oreophilum var. oreophilum
intro: Verbascum oreophilum var. oreophilum, also known as the alpine mullein, is a plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum oreophilum var. oreophilum include alleviating symptoms of asthma and other breathing disorders, as well as reducing swelling and pain in the throat and chest. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote relaxation.
